text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh… My tummy growled in the middle of class…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I swear I ate breakfast. 
I had five bread rolls, a carrot salad…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
A carrot hamburger steak, bacon and eggs… 
Minestrone, and a jelly dessert…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I burned it all off while running? 
I should stop by the school store…
